name: US Cash Advance
description_short: At 1603 W Park Row Dr suite c, Arlington, TX 76013, US Cash Advance can be reached at +1 682-686-4790.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical lending location in Detroit, Michigan, specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company has been reviewed by multiple customers and maintains a 4.4-star rating based on in-person service experiences. They position themselves as an accessible lender for individuals facing urgent financial needs who may have limited alternatives.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans ($1,000 or less), bad credit loans (up to $50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans. All loan types are advertised as accepting all credit types with no collateral required. Their stated process involves filling an online form, connection to a third-party lender, offer review, contract signing, and cash receipt. The Detroit location operates extended hours: Monday-Friday 8am-9pm and Saturday-Sunday 10am-7pm.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through staff professionalism and transparency, according to customer reviews. One reviewer specifically noted "no hidden fees or shady terms," and multiple customers highlighted fast turnaround times (45 minutes to a couple hours mentioned). The company emphasizes minimum paperwork, no credit checks required, and acceptance of customers with bad credit histories. Their physical presence allows for in-person consultations, which some customers found valuable for understanding repayment terms.

As an emergency cash lender, US Cash Advance serves the payday loan market, which inherently involves high-cost, short-term debt. While customer reviews praise service quality and speed, the fundamental product category carries significant financial risks including high APRs and debt cycles. The company's advertising mentions loans "up to $50,000" for bad credit but most core offerings are capped at $1,000, typical for payday products. Prospective borrowers should carefully review actual terms and APR before committing.
address: 1603 W Park Row Dr suite c, Arlington, TX 76013

company_info.headquarters: 1603 W Park Row Dr suite c, Arlington, TX 76013

pros: Extended operating hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for in-person consultations
Fast approval and funding process (customers report 45 minutes to 2 hours for in-person service)
Transparent fee and term communication, with customers specifically noting absence of hidden fees
Accepts all credit types, including customers with bad credit histories
Patient, informative staff per multiple customer reviews
cons: High-cost short-term debt product with APRs not disclosed on website, typical of payday loans
Physical waiting area described as cramped by at least one customer
Online pre-approval not available despite online application option
Advertises loans up to $50,000 for bad credit but most core products capped at $1,000
Third-party lender arrangement may complicate direct customer service resolution
best_for: Individuals needing emergency cash within hours for unexpected medical bills or urgent expenses
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Customers who prefer in-person service and verbal explanation of loan terms before commitment
People in Detroit area who value extended evening and weekend hours for loan processing
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area borrowers facing urgent financial emergencies who need cash within hours and have limited credit options, but require significant caution due to the high-cost nature of payday lending and undisclosed APR rates. Customers should understand that these loans are emergency stopgaps, not sustainable financial solutions, and that repayment terms likely involve substantial fees and interest costs typical of the payday loan industry.
